prompts.label: LED effectiveness
prompts.query: does LED light actually help with teeth whitening or placebo
prompts.claudeResponse: LED light does provide modest benefits when used with whitening gel, speeding up the bleaching process slightly, but isn't the primary active ingredient—the whitening agent itself does most of the work. Quality kits like GLO and Hismile combine LED with effective gels, but basic LED strips alone are less effective than gel-only products.
